chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.233 and 234 of 2019 Pakistan Petroleum Ltd. Versus SPEC Energy DMCC & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on applications under order XXIII Rule 1 CPC. 2. For hearing of applications under order XXXIX Rule 2 CPC. 3. For orders on office objections. 4. For hearing of main cases. 5. For hearing of stay applications. Dated: 17.10.2023 Mr. Fahad Khan for appellant. Mr. Umer Memon for respondent No.1. Mr. Adil Saeed for respondent No.6/proforma respondents. -.-.- The applications under order XXIII Rule 1 CPC, supported by affidavit of one Sayyed Touqeer Hussain Shah, authorized attorney of appellant, are placed/fixed by the office in both the appeals, which applications seek withdrawal of these two appeals. It is not objected by both the counsels appearing for respondents. Both the High Court Appeals as such are dismissed as not pressed along with pending applications. Judge Judge
